---
output: github_document
---

> ## ⚠️ Important Notice ⚠️
>
> Please note that as of this date, `carrier` still in its earliest development

# tstk: Time series toolkit

This is an example module that bundles common time series methods, which can be loaded with `{box}` use.

## Installation

You need to install `carrier` first (see [here](https://github.com/joshuamarie/carrier/blob/main/README.md)). The installation is easily done with:

``` bash
carrier install gh:joshuamarie/tstk-module
```
